title: FULLY FREE Unlimited API + OpenCode: MiniMax M3,Step 3.7 Flash,Nemotron 3 Ultra,GLM,Kimi!
summary: OpenRouter launched Fusion API, a compound model system that sends prompts to multiple models and uses a judge model to select the final answer. The creator tested Fusion against claims of Fable-level performance and found inconsistent results across real-world tasks, concluding it is not a true Fable competitor in current form.
writeup: The video examines OpenRouter's Fusion API, a compound model system that routes a prompt to multiple models and then uses a judge model to pick the final answer, drawing on ideas like ensemble methods and test-time compute. It matters because Fusion is pitched against Fable-level performance, a claim the creator puts to the test on real-world tasks. The takeaway: results were inconsistent across those tasks, and the conclusion is that Fusion is not a true Fable competitor in its current form.
